auth.label: API Key
auth.description: Perigon API key sent with the x-api-key request header. Create an account and manage API keys from the developer section at https://www.perigon.io/dev.

actions.name: get_journalist
actions.description: Get one Perigon journalist profile by journalist ID.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for retrieving a journalist by ID.

outputSchema.description: The normalized Perigon journalist profile response.

actions.name: search_articles
actions.description: Search Perigon news articles with keyword, date, entity, source, and category filters.

q.description: The primary search query using Perigon Boolean search syntax.

title.description: A search query scoped to article titles.

desc.description: A search query scoped to article descriptions.

content.description: A search query scoped to article content.

summary.description: A search query scoped to article summaries.

from.description: The earliest publication date or date-time to include.

to.description: The latest publication date or date-time to include.

addDateFrom.description: The earliest Perigon ingestion date or date-time to include.

addDateTo.description: The latest Perigon ingestion date or date-time to include.

category.description: The broad news categories to include.

source.description: The publisher domains or wildcard source patterns to include.

sourceGroup.description: The curated Perigon source groups to include.

language.description: The ISO 639 language codes to include.

country.description: The source country codes to include.

medium.description: The article media types to include.

personName.description: The exact person names to include.

personWikidataId.description: The Wikidata person IDs to include.

companyName.description: The exact company name to include.

companyId.description: The Perigon company IDs to include.

companySymbol.description: The company stock symbols to include.

clusterId.description: The story cluster IDs to include.

showReprints.description: Whether wire-service reprints should be included.

page.description: The zero-based page number to retrieve.

size.description: The number of results to return per page.

showNumResults.description: Whether Perigon should return an exact result count.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for searching Perigon news articles.

anyOf.description: The status code returned by Perigon.
The result count returned by Perigon when available.

articles.description: The article objects returned by Perigon.

outputSchema.description: The normalized Perigon article search response.

actions.name: search_companies
actions.description: Search Perigon company entities by name, domain, symbol, industry, country, and exchange.

name.description: A search query scoped to company names.

id.description: The Perigon company IDs to include.

country.description: The company country codes to include.

page.description: The zero-based page number to retrieve.

size.description: The number of results to return per page.

showNumResults.description: Whether Perigon should return an exact result count.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for searching Perigon company entities.

anyOf.description: The status code returned by Perigon.
The result count returned by Perigon when available.

results.description: The company objects returned by Perigon.

outputSchema.description: The normalized Perigon company search response.

actions.name: search_journalists
actions.description: Search Perigon journalist profiles by name, Twitter handle, post volume, and update date.

name.description: A search query scoped to journalist names.

twitter.description: The exact Twitter or X handle without the at sign.

updatedAtFrom.description: The earliest journalist profile update date or date-time.

updatedAtTo.description: The latest journalist profile update date or date-time.

page.description: The zero-based page number to retrieve.

size.description: The number of results to return per page.

showNumResults.description: Whether Perigon should return an exact result count.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for searching Perigon journalist profiles.

anyOf.description: The status code returned by Perigon.
The result count returned by Perigon when available.

results.description: The journalist objects returned by Perigon.

outputSchema.description: The normalized Perigon journalist search response.

actions.name: search_people
actions.description: Search Perigon people entities for Wikidata-backed profile metadata.

name.description: A search query scoped to person names.

wikidataId.description: The Wikidata person IDs to include.

page.description: The zero-based page number to retrieve.

size.description: The number of results to return per page.

showNumResults.description: Whether Perigon should return an exact result count.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for searching Perigon people entities.

anyOf.description: The status code returned by Perigon.
The result count returned by Perigon when available.

results.description: The people objects returned by Perigon.

outputSchema.description: The normalized Perigon people search response.

actions.name: search_sources
actions.description: Search Perigon media sources by domain, source group, traffic, paywall, and geography filters.

name.description: A search query scoped to source names or aliases.

sourceGroup.description: The curated Perigon source group to include.

domain.description: The exact source domains to include.

paywall.description: Whether to filter sources by paywall status.

showSubdomains.description: Whether subdomains should be returned as separate sources.

sourceLat.description: The latitude used for source geo search.

sourceLon.description: The longitude used for source geo search.

sourceMaxDistance.description: The source geo-search radius in kilometers.

page.description: The zero-based page number to retrieve.

size.description: The number of results to return per page.

showNumResults.description: Whether Perigon should return an exact result count.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for searching Perigon media sources.

anyOf.description: The status code returned by Perigon.
The result count returned by Perigon when available.

results.description: The source objects returned by Perigon.

outputSchema.description: The normalized Perigon source search response.

actions.name: search_stories
actions.description: Search Perigon story clusters for evolving news narratives and grouped article coverage.

q.description: The primary search query using Perigon Boolean search syntax.

title.description: A search query scoped to article titles.

desc.description: A search query scoped to article descriptions.

content.description: A search query scoped to article content.

summary.description: A search query scoped to article summaries.

from.description: The earliest publication date or date-time to include.

to.description: The latest publication date or date-time to include.

addDateFrom.description: The earliest Perigon ingestion date or date-time to include.

addDateTo.description: The latest Perigon ingestion date or date-time to include.

category.description: The broad news categories to include.

source.description: The publisher domains or wildcard source patterns to include.

sourceGroup.description: The curated Perigon source groups to include.

language.description: The ISO 639 language codes to include.

country.description: The source country codes to include.

medium.description: The article media types to include.

personName.description: The exact person names to include.

personWikidataId.description: The Wikidata person IDs to include.

companyName.description: The exact company name to include.

companyId.description: The Perigon company IDs to include.

companySymbol.description: The company stock symbols to include.

clusterId.description: The story cluster IDs to include.

showReprints.description: Whether wire-service reprints should be included.

page.description: The zero-based page number to retrieve.

size.description: The number of results to return per page.

showNumResults.description: Whether Perigon should return an exact result count.

name.description: A search query scoped to story names.

initializedFrom.description: The earliest story initialization date or date-time to include.

initializedTo.description: The latest story initialization date or date-time to include.

updatedFrom.description: The earliest story update date or date-time to include.

updatedTo.description: The latest story update date or date-time to include.

minUniqueSources.description: The minimum number of unique sources in a story.

minSourceDiversity.description: The minimum unique-source to unique-article ratio.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for searching Perigon story clusters.

anyOf.description: The status code returned by Perigon.
The result count returned by Perigon when available.

stories.description: The story cluster objects returned by Perigon.

outputSchema.description: The normalized Perigon story search response.

actions.name: search_topics
actions.description: Browse or search Perigon topics used to classify news content.

page.description: The zero-based page number to retrieve.

size.description: The number of results to return per page.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for browsing or searching Perigon topics.

anyOf.description: The total number of matching topics when available.

data.description: The topic objects returned by Perigon.

actions.name: search_wikipedia
actions.description: Search Perigon Wikipedia pages by text, identity, category, revision, and pageview filters.

title.description: A search query scoped to Wikipedia page titles.

summary.description: A search query scoped to Wikipedia summaries.

text.description: A search query scoped to Wikipedia page text.

reference.description: A search query scoped to Wikipedia page references.

scrapedAtFrom.description: The earliest Perigon scrape date or date-time to include.

scrapedAtTo.description: The latest Perigon scrape date or date-time to include.

wikiRevisionFrom.description: The earliest Wikipedia revision date or date-time to include.

wikiRevisionTo.description: The latest Wikipedia revision date or date-time to include.

pageviewsFrom.description: The minimum average daily pageview count.

pageviewsTo.description: The maximum average daily pageview count.

withPageviews.description: Whether only pages with pageview data should be returned.

id.description: The Perigon Wikipedia page IDs to include.

sectionId.description: The Wikipedia section IDs to include.

wikiCode.description: The wiki project codes to include.

wikidataInstanceOfId.description: The Wikidata instance-of IDs to include.

wikidataInstanceOfLabel.description: The Wikidata instance-of labels to include.

wikiPageId.description: The Wikipedia page IDs to include.

wikiRevisionId.description: The Wikipedia revision IDs to include.

page.description: The zero-based page number to retrieve.

size.description: The number of results to return per page.

showNumResults.description: Whether Perigon should return an exact result count.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for searching Perigon Wikipedia pages.

anyOf.description: The status code returned by Perigon.
The result count returned by Perigon when available.

results.description: The Wikipedia page objects returned by Perigon.

outputSchema.description: The normalized Perigon Wikipedia search response.

actions.name: summarize_news
actions.description: Generate an AI summary over Perigon news articles matching the supplied filters.

q.description: The primary search query using Perigon Boolean search syntax.

title.description: A search query scoped to article titles.

desc.description: A search query scoped to article descriptions.

content.description: A search query scoped to article content.

summary.description: A search query scoped to article summaries.

from.description: The earliest publication date or date-time to include.

to.description: The latest publication date or date-time to include.

addDateFrom.description: The earliest Perigon ingestion date or date-time to include.

addDateTo.description: The latest Perigon ingestion date or date-time to include.

category.description: The broad news categories to include.

source.description: The publisher domains or wildcard source patterns to include.

sourceGroup.description: The curated Perigon source groups to include.

language.description: The ISO 639 language codes to include.

country.description: The source country codes to include.

medium.description: The article media types to include.

personName.description: The exact person names to include.

personWikidataId.description: The Wikidata person IDs to include.

companyName.description: The exact company name to include.

companyId.description: The Perigon company IDs to include.

companySymbol.description: The company stock symbols to include.

clusterId.description: The story cluster IDs to include.

showReprints.description: Whether wire-service reprints should be included.

page.description: The zero-based page number to retrieve.

size.description: The number of results to return per page.

showNumResults.description: Whether Perigon should return an exact result count.

maxArticleCount.description: The maximum number of matching articles to summarize.

returnedArticleCount.description: The maximum number of source articles to return.

maxTokens.description: The maximum generated-token budget for the summary.

model.description: The Perigon-supported language model to use.

summarizeFields.description: The article fields Perigon should include in the summarization context.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for summarizing matching Perigon news articles.

anyOf.description: The status code returned by Perigon.
The result count returned by Perigon when available.
The AI-generated news summary returned by Perigon.

results.description: The source article objects returned by Perigon.

actions.name: vector_search_news
actions.description: Run semantic vector search over recent Perigon news articles with optional structured filters.

prompt.description: The natural-language prompt for semantic news search.

page.description: The zero-based page number to retrieve.

size.description: The number of results to return per page.

pubDateFrom.description: The earliest article publication date or date-time to include.

pubDateTo.description: The latest article publication date or date-time to include.

showReprints.description: Whether wire-service reprints should be included.

filter.description: A Perigon vector-search filter object with direct fields or nested AND, OR, and NOT clauses.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for Perigon semantic news vector search.

anyOf.description: The status code returned by Perigon.

results.description: The scored vector-search result objects returned by Perigon.

actions.name: vector_search_wikipedia
actions.description: Run semantic vector search over Perigon Wikipedia content with optional structured filters.

prompt.description: The natural-language prompt for semantic Wikipedia search.

page.description: The zero-based page number to retrieve.

size.description: The number of results to return per page.

pageviewsFrom.description: The minimum average daily pageview count.

pageviewsTo.description: The maximum average daily pageview count.

wikiRevisionFrom.description: The earliest Wikipedia revision date or date-time to include.

wikiRevisionTo.description: The latest Wikipedia revision date or date-time to include.

filter.description: A Perigon vector-search filter object with direct fields or nested AND, OR, and NOT clauses.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for Perigon semantic Wikipedia vector search.

anyOf.description: The status code returned by Perigon.

results.description: The scored vector-search result objects returned by Perigon.
